title: Crispy Banana Fritters
description: A sweet and crispy dessert made with sliced bananas and a crunchy exterior.
instructions: 1. Preheat the oil in a deep frying pan to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a bowl, mash the bananas and mix in the sugar, flour, baking powder, and sour cream.
3. Using a spoon or small scoop, drop the banana mixture into the oil, forming small balls.
4. Fry the banana fritters for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until golden brown.
5. Using a slotted spoon, remove the fritters from the oil and place them on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
6. Sprinkle the crispy fried onions on top of the fritters.
7. Serve the crispy banana fritters warm, dust with powdered sugar if desired.
